name: Southwest Rapid Rewards® Performance Business Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 80,000 bonus Rapid Rewards points after spending $5,000 in first 3 months. Additional 10,000 bonus miles when adding an authorized user.

earning_rates.category: Rapid Rewards Hotel and Car Rental Partners

annual_credits.name: Anniversary Points
annual_credits.description: 9,000 Rapid Rewards anniversary points each year (worth ~$134 at 1.49¢/point)

other_benefits.name: Three EarlyBird Check-In Per Year
other_benefits.description: Complimentary EarlyBird Check-In on up to 3 reservations per year

other_benefits.name: Upgraded Boardings
other_benefits.description: Up to 4 upgraded boardings per year (A-List priority)

other_benefits.name: First Bag Free
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free for cardmember and up to 8 companions on the same reservation

other_benefits.name: 25% Back on Inflight
other_benefits.description: 25% back on all inflight purchases (Wi-Fi, movies, drinks, messaging) as statement credits

other_benefits.name: Employee Cards at No Cost
other_benefits.description: Add employee cards at no additional cost

other_benefits.name: Earn Companion Pass Qualifying Points
other_benefits.description: Earn 1,500 toward Companion Pass qualification for each $10,000 spent annually

other_benefits.name: Earn PQP
other_benefits.description: Earn 1,500 Premier Qualifying Points (PQP) per $12,000 spent, up to 3,000 PQP per year

notes: Southwest's top-tier business card. $299 AF (increased from $199 in 2025). 9,000 anniversary points (~$134) covers ~45% of AF. The 4 upgraded boardings per year are very valuable during peak travel. 3 EarlyBird Check-Ins and enhanced PQP earnings make it a strong option for businesses with heavy Southwest spend. As of 2025, AF increased from $199 to $299. Best for businesses that fly Southwest frequently.
